services.title: Web Application Audit
services.description: Comprehensive security assessment of web applications covering OWASP Top 10, business logic flaws, API security, and authentication flows.

services.title: Threat Intelligence
services.description: Proactive threat hunting, phishing campaign analysis, MITRE ATT&CK mapping, and actionable intelligence reporting.

services.title: Reconnaissance & OSINT
services.description: Deep asset discovery, subdomain enumeration, attack surface mapping, and continuous monitoring for exposure detection.

services.title: Infrastructure Hardening
services.description: Server and network security hardening with defense-in-depth strategy, compliance checking, and continuous audit validation.
